hero.supertitle: HUKUMAR HALAL TA FARKO A NAJERIYA
hero.subheadline: Takardar halal ba kawai alamar addini ba ce — ita ce alamar inganci, tsabta da samarwa mai ɗa'a da ake gane ta a duk duniya. Bude kasuwancin ku ga tattalin arzikin halal na dolar tiriliyan 3.

footer.proudly: Najeriya da Alfahari. An Gane ta a Duniya.
